text: Like all consumer staples companies, McCormick has been struggling to combat rising operating costs. It's taking time for the company's plans to take effect, leading to near-term margin compression.

title: Why McCormick Stock Gained 12% Last Month
text: McCormick's results showed relative improvement in the most recent quarter, although some metrics remain below their historical averages. With modest sales growth and ongoing profit challenges, there may be better dividend investing opportunities today.

title: Is McCormick Stock a Buy?
text: McCormick had a rough 2022 year on the earnings front. Price increases are likely to return the business to a more normal footing this year.

title: 1 Passive Income Stock Investors Should Pay Close Attention To
text: McCormick's sales grew in the first quarter while profits slightly contracted. The spice maker boasts a nearly-four-decade dividend growth streak.
